user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Migrate the TC387 three-phase inverter PWM to the IfxGtm_Pwm unified API on GTM TOM1 using the same six outputs and pins (U: HS TOM1 CH2->P00.3, LS TOM1 CH1->P00.2; V: HS CH4->P00.5, LS CH3->P00.4; W: HS CH6->P00.7, LS CH5->P00.6). Keep center-aligned PWM at 20 kHz, 0.5 µs dead-time, min pulse 1.0 µs, initial duties U=25%, V=50%, W=75%, TOM clock = cmuFxclk0, timer base = TOM1 CH0, push-pull with cmosAutomotiveSpeed1, active-high.
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate six complementary PWM outputs on GTM TOM1 (three high-side and three low-side) with center-aligned 20 kHz period, 0.5 µs dead-time insertion, 1.0 µs minimum pulse enforcement, initial U/V/W duties of 25/50/75%, using cmuFxclk0 and TOM1 CH0 as time base, active-high polarity, push-pull outputs with cmosAutomotiveSpeed1, and shadow transfer on period match with synchronous updates.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use the unified IfxGtm_Pwm driver on TC3xx to configure TOM1 with CH0 as the time base and six TOM1 channels as complementary pairs. Enable GTM and FXCLK0, set pin outputs via IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout with push-pull and cmosAutomotiveSpeed1, set active-high polarity, configure center-aligned operation in the Pwm config, set 20 kHz period (assuming FXCLK0=100 MHz), apply 0.5 µs dead-time via IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelDeadTimeImmediate, and program initial duties via IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelDutyImmediate. Enforce 1.0 µs minimum pulse in the duty update logic.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Unified IfxGtm_Pwm is available in the template and matches the user’s explicit preference. It supports center-aligned operation, duty updates, polarity, and dead-time updates on TOM, fulfilling the 3-phase complementary PWM requirement on TOM1.

runtime_function.name: GTM_TOM_3_Phase_Inverter_PWM_update
runtime_function.purpose: Update U/V/W duties synchronously with center-aligned PWM, enforcing 1.0 µs minimum pulse and maintaining 0.5 µs dead-time for complementary outputs.

migration_notes.context_preserved: The solution keeps TOM1 as the PWM generator with center-aligned 20 kHz output, uses cmuFxclk0, preserves complementary high/low outputs with active-high polarity, assigns pins via IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout using push-pull and cmosAutomotiveSpeed1, applies 0.5 µs dead-time using IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelDeadTimeImmediate, and sets initial duties to U=25%, V=50%, W=75%. Note: Requested pin mappings must match actual TOUT-to-pin availability on TC38x LFBGA-516; P00.2 is TOM1 CH5 (TOUT11). Validate TOM1 CH2->P00.3, CH3->P00.4, CH4->P00.5, CH6->P00.7 against IfxGtm_PinMap.h and adjust channel-to-pin bindings if the requested pairs are not available.

PWM.rationale: Driver locked by refiner node (user explicit or engine-scored)
